$schema-description: Master-sequence TX fixture set per specs/004-baptism-workflow/contracts/master-sequence-wire-format.md §WHO_ARE_YOU app payload (4 B): [0] machineType u8, [1..2] fwType u16 big-endian, [3] reset flag (non-zero = set), length-only reject. Payload bytes are NORMATIVE synthesis targets verified against the slave parser (AutoAddressSlave.c:230-235) — TX fixtures, not bench captures; the live-boundary proof is Phase F. Each parseable entry carries name, 4-byte hex payload, expectsParse, expectedMachineType/expectedFwType/expectedReset, and a provenance source. SET_ADDRESS entries are present (commit group A3) per §SET_ADDRESS app payload (16 B): [0..11] the three UUID words as a byte-echo of the validated WHO_I_AM, [12..15] SP_Address u32 big-endian, length-only reject; slave parse cited at AutoAddressSlave.c:263-292. SET_ADDRESS parseable entries carry expectedUuid (array of 3 numbers) and expectedSpAddress (number). Loaded by Tests/Unit/Can/MasterSequenceFixtureTests.fs (T008).

fixtures.name: claim_eden_xp_12v
fixtures.source: Synthesis per contract §WHO_ARE_YOU — claim EDEN-XP (machineType 0x03) at 12V fwType 0x0004, reset set; slave parse cited at AutoAddressSlave.c:230-235.

fixtures.source: Synthesis per contract §WHO_ARE_YOU — claim OPTIMUS-XP (machineType 0x0A) at 12V fwType 0x0004, reset set; slave parse cited at AutoAddressSlave.c:230-235.

fixtures.name: malformed_too_short_3b
fixtures.source: Synthesis — claim_eden_xp_12v minus its last byte (3 bytes). Length-only reject.
fixtures.reason: Length is 3 bytes — wire contract requires exactly 4.

fixtures.name: set_address_eden_xp_12v_board1
fixtures.source: Synthesis per contract §SET_ADDRESS — EDEN-XP 12V board 1, spAddress 0x00030101 (R3 worked example = vendored DeviceVariantConfig 'Keyboard 1' constant); UUID words lifted from the real bench-capture WHO_I_AM in whoIAmFixtures.json virgin_panel_12v, so the echoed bytes have real provenance; slave parse cited at AutoAddressSlave.c:263-292.

fixtures.name: set_address_optimus_xp_24v_board1
fixtures.source: Synthesis per contract §SET_ADDRESS — OPTIMUS-XP 24V board 1, spAddress 0x000A03C1 (machineType 0x0A<<16 | (0x000F & 0x3FF)<<6 | 1); synthetic UUID 0xA2A2A2A2/0xB2B2B2B2/0xC2C2C2C2 matching the whoIAmFixtures.json optimus_xp UUID; slave parse cited at AutoAddressSlave.c:263-292.

fixtures.name: malformed_too_short_15b
fixtures.source: Synthesis — set_address_eden_xp_12v_board1 minus its last byte (15 bytes). Length-only reject.
fixtures.reason: Length is 15 bytes — wire contract requires exactly 16.
